dashboard.title: Welcome back, {name}
dashboard.description: Keep track of your supported teams, open founder invitations, and the next useful steps.
dashboard.heroText: You support founder teams with an outside perspective. Access only starts once both founders have actively approved the advisor relationship.
dashboard.teamsDescription: See each team's approval status, current progress, and where your attention is most useful right now.
dashboard.emptyText: Once both founders have started and are linked through your invite, the team will appear here with its approval status.
dashboard.emptyHint: Until then, new invitations already appear above as open team starts.
dashboard.readyTeamsDescription: Teams with active advisor access and usable working drafts.
dashboard.waitingTeamsDescription: Teams where one founder approval is still missing.
dashboard.pausedTeamsDescription: Teams where your advisor access is not active.
dashboard.readySectionDescription: Approval is complete. This is where it is worth opening the workbook, report, or current snapshot.
dashboard.waitingSectionDescription: These teams are visible, but not fully approved yet. Keep an eye on the approval status.
dashboard.pausedSectionDescription: Approval is currently not fully active here. The status remains visible, but working access is paused.

inviteTeam.title: Invite team
inviteTeam.description: Create a new founder matching starting point. Both founders receive an invitation, and progress appears directly in your advisor dashboard.
inviteTeam.teamNameHint: Optional. If you add a team or project name, it will appear later in the dashboard and in the founder invitation.
inviteTeam.v1Hint: V1 stays intentionally lean: founder matching first, without new parallel workflows.
inviteTeam.sentText: Both founders were invited by email. The team now appears directly in your dashboard.
inviteTeam.createdText: The team has been created and is visible in the dashboard. Share the founder links manually if email delivery did not fully work right now.
inviteTeam.copyFailed: Copying is not available right now.

statuses.waitingSecondApproval: Waiting for the second founder approval
statuses.waitWorkbook: Wait for the first workbook draft
statuses.checkNewReaction: Check workbook for a new response
statuses.movesToTeams: Will move to your supported teams shortly

accessDescription.revoked: The approval for this team is no longer active. You can see the status, but cannot continue working.
accessDescription.ready: Approval is complete. Workbook, report, and snapshot can be used as soon as each item is available.
accessDescription.paused: At least one approval is currently not active. You can keep an eye on the status, but cannot continue working.
accessDescription.waiting: One founder approval is still missing. Once both founders approve, the team is open for advisor support.

pending.title: Newly invited
pending.description: You have already started these team invites. Once both founders have started, they will automatically move into your supported teams.

report.debugTitle: Advisor report could not be loaded
report.debugText: In this state, the product page would send you straight back to the advisor dashboard. Debug mode keeps this state visible so we can see the actual break point.
report.missingText: There is no renderable advisor report for this team yet. Once the founder report has been fully generated, you can continue working with the advisor report here.
report.impulsesText: Capture brief observations or facilitation notes here. Each section has exactly one editable advisor prompt. Empty fields remove the entry again.

snapshot.notAvailableText: There is no reliable snapshot available for this team context yet.
snapshot.intro: A compact coaching snapshot with focus areas, advisor prompts, founder response, and the next useful steps.

invite.notFoundText: This advisor link is no longer valid or could not be matched to a team.
invite.intro: As an advisor, you can see the founder snapshot, focus areas, and alignment workbook. Raw assessment answers stay protected.
invite.roleText: Your role is a structured outside perspective: capture observations, add follow-up questions, and suggest useful next steps.
invite.alreadyLinkedText: The advisor link has already been connected to another profile. If that was not intended, the team needs a new advisor link from the workbook.
invite.linkProfileText: Sign in so your advisor profile can be linked cleanly to this team. After that, you will land directly in the advisor area.
invite.activateText: Your profile is signed in. With one click, you can link yourself as advisor to this team and get access to the snapshot, focus areas, and workbook.
invite.activeText: Your profile is already linked to this team. You can go straight to the advisor dashboard or open the workbook.
invite.whatYouSee: What you can see as advisor

visibleItems.snapshot: Founder snapshot and prioritized tension or focus areas
visibleItems.workbook: the shared alignment workbook, including advisor prompts

invite.notVisible: Raw assessment answers and the full answer history of both founders are not part of advisor access.

errors.alreadyClaimed: This advisor link is already connected to another profile.
errors.invalidToken: The advisor link could not be confirmed.
errors.updateFailed: The link could not be saved right now.
